compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Long-running execution that survives client timeouts.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] run_workflow returns a run_id immediately; get_workflow_status/get_workflow_result read state via replay.
- [ ] CLI `rebar workflow run`; library rebar.run_workflow (sync ok); MCP async.
- [ ] Best-effort progress notifications; never depended upon.
Files: src/rebar/mcp_server.py, src/rebar/_cli/__init__.py, src/rebar/__init__.py
compiled_state.title: WS-C4: Async run_workflow over MCP + CLI/library entrypoints
